title: Star Wars Racer Arcade
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the arcade version of the game|the LucasArts console and computer game [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']]|linebreak=1}} {{VideoGame |image=[[File:EpisodeIRacerArcade.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Racer Arcade'' |developer=[[Sega Rosso|Sega-AM5]] |publisher=[[Sega]], [[LucasArts]] |release date=[[May 1]], [[2000]]{{WebCite|url=https://www.ign.com/games/star-wars-racer-arcade|text=Star Wars Racer Arcade|work=[[Wikipedia:IGN|IGN]]|archivedate=20230713085531}} |closed= |upc= |engine= |genre=[[Wikipedia:Computer and video game genres#Simulation|Simulation]], Racing |modes=[[Wikipedia:Single-player|Single player]], [[Wikipedia:Multiplayer|Multiplayer]] |ratings= |platforms=[[Arcade game/Legends|Arcade game]] |series= |basegame= |expansions= |director= |producer= |designer= |programmer= |artist= |writer= |composer= |timeline= |prev= |next= }} [[File:EpisodeIRacerArcadeGraphics.jpg|thumb|250px|Game graphics]] '''''Star Wars Racer Arcade''''' is a [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] [[Arcade game/Legends|arcade game]] developed by [[Sega Rosso|AM5]] and [[LucasArts]] and released by [[Sega]]. It was released in [[2000]]. ==Opening crawl== {{OpeningCrawl |name=STAR WARS
RACER ARCADE |text=For generations, the GALACTIC PODRACING CIRCUIT has thrilled citizens of the Outer Rim Territories with its dangerous combination of high-speed vehicles and high-risk courses Amid the ruffians and racing elite, one champion stands above the rest. His name is Sebulba,This is replaced with the initials associated with the highest score. a cunning and ruthless pilot who wins by any means necessary. To challenge him, all the best Podrace pilots in the Outer Rim have gathered on the desert planet Tatooine for the legendary BOONTA EVE CLASSIC This monumental event will determine who will claim the title of fastest Podracer in the Galaxy... }} ==Gameplay== There are four tracks in the game, each with their own level of difficulty: Bantha Tracks (Easy), Smuggler's Cove (Normal), Pixelito Challenge (Hard) and Boonta Eve Classic (Expert). The player can assume the role of either [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[Ben Quadinaros/Legends|Ben Quadinaros]], [[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano]] or [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]].
